{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320161317029DFE4482B018599F6F"}"},"total":531},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7466486214605767449","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"写的很好，思路不错，思路很清晰，作者，加油努力"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1738434554,"group_id":"7459083164812594238","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5Cc+4eZPzfQxsy4368a+kW1kqR1KY+m9JIEUwlcGk4j","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"1609290827704078","user_name":"用户16092908"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1609290827704078","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7459083164812594238","book_info":{"abstract":"20世纪八十年代末，华夏还没有特种部队！
于是，上头命令，全军36个集团军，齐建百支海、陆、空三军特种部队！
从无到有，打造100把大国利刃，威慑全球，扬我军威！
林川，三年前穿越而来，拥有超越这个时代40年的特种战力、练兵能力、特种指挥战术！
担任31集团军，特种部队选拔总教官。
　其他集团军都是海、陆、空三种特种部队分开组建。
　　而林川则是一口气直接打造集海、陆、空三军实力于一体的三栖特种部队！
　　半年后，100支特种部队集结比武对抗。
　　当林川带着天狼三栖特种部队登场时，全军都傻眼了！
　　人家一支特种部队，最少都有三百人，海陆空三支加起来，足有千人之多！
　　可天狼，全部加起来，也才三十多个人！
　　这要怎么打？
　　怎么可能打得过？！
　　面对全军的质疑和嘲笑，在对抗比试中，林川带领天狼三栖特种部队，横扫全军！
　　以全特种科目断层第一的成绩，震撼全军！！！
　　站在主席台上，林川面对全军特种部队，大声怒吼，告诉世人：“这，才是真正的特种部队！！！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/00011d3163ef7c11022e11572de678d8","author":"红杏压海棠","author_id":"","book_id":"7459083164812594238","book_name":"统领全军！世界各国跪求我当教官","book_short_name":"最强特种战神","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#201818","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.2万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":375,"name":"特种兵","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=375&name=特种兵&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7459083191157015102","read_count":"21473","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1737169"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.5","serial_count":"526","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,系统,穿越,特种兵","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/f089e7492e96790352d8674b9fcaea66~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779178398&x-signature=lko2NQEF0KBiYy7j2%2FuADMZsN%2Bk%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"413873900094580","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"33"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320161317029DFE4482B018599F6F"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读1小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":3,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":4394,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":5746},"user_ac 于是，上头命令，全军36个集团军，齐建百支海、陆、空三军特种部队！
从无到有，打造100把大国利刃，威慑全球，扬我军威！
林川，三年前穿越而来，拥有超越这个时代40年的特种战力、练兵能力、特种指挥战术！
担任31集团军，特种部队选拔总教官。
　其他集团军都是海、陆、空三种特种部队分开组建。
　　而林川则是一口气直接打造集海、陆、空三军实力于一体的三栖特种部队！
　　半年后，100支特种部队集结比武对抗。
　　当林川带着天狼三栖特种部队登场时，全军都傻眼了！
　　人家一支特种部队，最少都有三百人，海陆空三支加起来，足有千人之多！
　　可天狼，全部加起来，也才三十多个人！
　　这要怎么打？
　　怎么可能打得过？！
　　面对全军的质疑和嘲笑，在对抗比试中，林川带领天狼三栖特种部队，横扫全军！
　　以全特种科目断层第一的成绩，震撼全军！！！
